underlying_goal: User wanted Claude to analyze memory/context files about AI agents (Goose and Claude) in a SkogAI project and produce written analyses — first a markdown file about Goose, then a verbal analysis of Claude's context management philosophy
friction_detail: The referenced file c.md didn't exist; Claude adapted by finding the similarly named c.m file instead.
brief_summary: User asked Claude to research scattered memory-block files about AI agents and synthesize written analyses — Claude successfully produced both a markdown file about Goose and a philosophical analysis of Claude's context management approach.
